title: Meet the course team
subtitle: Our dedicated course leaders bring passion and expertise to every lesson, supporting your journey to new skills.
valentinaDesc: Valentina is an experienced Norwegian teacher with solid language and grammar knowledge.
vladimirDesc: Vladimir is a Norwegian teacher focused on helping students master language fundamentals and grammar.
mariaDesc: Maria leads yoga classes focusing on both physical and mental well-being for all community members.
sviatoslavDesc: Sviatoslav helps community members master digital tools, from translation apps to essential computer skills.
